field.title: Title
field.label: Label
field.speaker: Speaker
field.textSpeedHelp: Players can disable text animations in their preferences.

message.setAsStartConfirm: Make this the starting scene? Players will begin the story here.
message.orphansCountWord: {count, plural, one {# orphan scene} other {# orphan scenes}}

empty.selectSceneHint: Click a scene in the graph to edit it.
empty.noCharactersUniverse: No characters in this universe yet.
empty.noPlacesUniverse: No places in this universe yet.
empty.noRelatedAvailable: Nothing else in this universe yet.
empty.noStaged: No characters on stage. Add one below.
empty.noChoicesHint: Drag from this scene's "next" port to another scene to create a choice.
empty.reorderHint: Drag the handle to reorder choices.
empty.cantDeleteStartHint: Set another scene as the start before deleting this one.
empty.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. Unique within this universe.
empty.slugError: Slug must start with a letter or digit and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
empty.labelHint: Shows up in the graph and choice list. Doesn't have to be unique.
empty.sfxHint: One-shot: plays on scene entry, fades out on exit. Use for voice lines and short effects.
empty.bgmHint: Loops across every scene unless a scene overrides it.
empty.bgmOverrideHint: Leave empty to inherit the story's BGM.
empty.bgmSilencedHint: Music will fade out on this scene.

tooltip.pickSfxTitle: Pick a one-shot sound effect or voice line
